zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah Dennis於1661年出生在英國時，她的父親Richard Dennis32歲，母親Martha Royall32歲。她於1691年6月16日與William Cox在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1747年3月之前在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah Dennis于1661年出生在英国时，她的父亲Richard Dennis32岁，母亲Martha Royall32岁。她于1691年6月16日与William Cox在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1747年3月之前在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可。

nameMeanings.name: Dennis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English (Old French) personal name Denis(e), Dinis(e), vernacular forms of Latin Dionysius, Greek Dionysios ‘(follower) of Dionysos’, an eastern god introduced to the classical pantheon at a relatively late date and bearing a name of probably Semitic origin. The name was borne by various early Christian saints, including Saint Denis, the martyred 3rd-century bishop of Paris who became the patron saint of France. From the 12th century onward, the popularity of the name in England (and of its cognates, mainly Denis , in the continental Europe) seems to have been largely due to French influence. The feminine form Dionysia (in vernacular English likewise Den(n)is) is also found, and some examples of the surname may originate from it.
English: from Middle English deneis, a variant of danais ‘Danish’, with the vowel influenced by Middle English denshe (Old English denisc). Compare Dence .

Irish (mainly Dublin and Cork): of the same origin as 1 and 2 above, sometimes an alternative form to Donohue but more often to McDonough , since the personal name Donnchadh was Anglicized as Donough or Denis.

variants.name: Dec
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Aleksander, Andrzej, Casimir, Ignacy, Jerzy, Krystyna, Krzysztof, Malgorzata, Mikolaj, Stanislaw, Tadeusz.
Polish: from a pet form of the personal name Dionizy, Polish form of Dionysius (see Dennis ).

variants.name: Dennison
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name Denis (see Dennis ) + -son. Compare Tennyson .
English (of Norman origin): from Anglo-Norman French deinzein, a burgess who enjoyed the privileges of those living deinz la cité ‘within the city’.

variants.name: Denny
meanings: English and Scottish: from Middle English Den(n)y, a pet form of the personal name Denis (see Dennis ). Compare Tenney .

English: habitational name from Danny in Hurstpierpoint, Sussex, recorded as Danye in 1343. Alternatively, the name may arise from Denny in Waterbeach, Cambridgeshire, but no medieval evidence with a habitative preposition has been found in the case of the latter.
Scottish: habitational name from Denny in Stirlingshire.

variants.name: Diniz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Augusto, Celso, Francisco, Luis, Ricardo, Rogerio, Alvaro, Anselmo, Antero, Carlos.  Portuguese Joao, Marcio.
Portuguese: from the personal name Dinis, a vernacular form of Dionysius (see Dennis ).

variants.name: Denes
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Bela, Laszlo, Miklos, Tibor, Aranka, Balint, Endre, Ferenc, Lajos, Zoltan.  Jewish Imrich, Meyer.  Romanian Doina, Matei, Radu.
Hungarian (Dénes): from the personal name Dénes, from Greek Dionysios (see Dennis ). The surname Dénes is also found in Slovakia; compare 2 below.
Slovak (Deneš and Déneš) and Romanian (also Deneş): from the Hungarian personal name Dénes ‘Dennis’, or an adaptation of the Hungarian surname Dénes (see 1 above).

variants.name: Dennett
meanings: English: from a pet form of Middle English Denis (see Dennis ), or possibly from a pet form of Denise, as, for example, Denote, a female character in Piers Plowman.

variants.name: Dinges
meanings: German: from a vernacular form of the Latin personal name Dionysius (see Dennis ). Compare Dings .

variants.name: Denis
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Camille, Jacques, Armand, Marcel, Andre, Pierre, Serge, Yvan, Alphonse, Edouard, Francois, Gaetane.  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Jorge, Roberto, Angel, Francisco, Joaquin, Juan, Manuel, Miguel, Ramon, Rolando.

French, Walloon, Breton, West Indian (mainly Haiti), German, Dutch, English, and Portuguese; Spanish and Galician (Denís): from the personal name Denis, Spanish and Galician Denís, from Latin Dionysius ‘(follower) of Dionysos’ (see Dennis ). Compare Dennee .
Ukrainian and Rusyn: variant transliteration of   Denys  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Dings
meanings: Dutch and German: from a vernacular form of the Latin personal name Dionysius (see Dennis ). Compare Dinges .

variants.name: Dinis
meanings: Portuguese and Galician: from Dinis, a Portuguese personal name equivalent to Dennis .

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

historicEvents.title: South Sea Bubble
historicEvents.description: The South Sea Bubble Bill was passed by the House of Lords in 1720. This allowed the South Sea company to monopolize trade with South America. The company underwrote the English National Debt which promised 5% interest from the government. As shares rose exponentially, many companies were created and many fortunes were made. The stocks crashed and many people lost their money which caused them to become destitute overnight and suicide was common.  Robert Walpole took charge of the South Sea Bubble Financial Crisis by dividing the national debt between the Bank of England, the Treasury, and the Sinking Fund.

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah Dennis was born in 1661, in England, her father, Richard Dennis, was 32 and her mother, Martha Royall, was 32. She married William Cox on 16 June 1691, in Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 6 daughters. She died before March 1747, in Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sarah Dennis est née en 1661, à Angleterre, son père, Richard Dennis, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Martha Royall, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé William Cox le 16 juin 1691, à Henrico, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée avant mars 1747, à Henrico, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sarah Dennis 1661 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Dennis 32 und ihre Mutter Martha Royall 32. Sie hat am 16. Juni 1691 in Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America William Cox geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 6 Töchter. Sie starb vor März 1747 in Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Dennis è nata il nel 1661 nel England, sua padre, Richard Dennis, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Martha Royall, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato William Cox il 16 giugno 1691, nel Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 6 figlie. Morì prima del marzo 1747, nel Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Sarah Dennisが1661年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Richard Dennisは32歳，母Martha Royallは32歳であった。1691年6月16日にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ヘンリコでWilliam Coxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1747年3月以前にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ヘンリコで死去した。

ko.Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial Amer: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 헨리코
ko.Cumberland, Pennsylvania, British Coloni: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 펜실베이니아 주 c벌랜드
ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Dennis(이)가 1661년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Dennis(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Martha Royall(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1691년 6월 16일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 헨리코에서 William Cox(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1747년 3월 이전 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 헨리코에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Dennis nasceu em 1661, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Dennis, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Martha Royall, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com William Cox em 16 de junho de 1691, em Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu antes março de 1747, em Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah Dennis родилась в 1661 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Dennis было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Martha Royall, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Cox 16 июня 1691 г. в местности хенрику, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 6 дочерей. Она умерла перед марта 1747 г. в местности хенрику, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sarah Dennis nació en 1661, en Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Dennis, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Martha Royall, tenía 32 años. Se casó con William Cox el 16 de junio de 1691, en Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 6 hijas. Murió antes de marzo de 1747, en Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America.
